entries.name: theme:purge-expired-snapshots
entries.purpose: Nightly 03 UTC — dispatch PurgeExpiredThemeSnapshotsJob. Retains last-5 Theme rows per (tenant, mode) (last-20 for tenants with theme_rollback_extended).

entries.name: theme:warm-resolved-tokens-cache
entries.purpose: Hourly — dispatch CacheThemeResolvedTokensJob for every tenant with an active theme, so the theme:resolved:{tenant}:{mode} Redis keys never go cold. Job is idempotent + shouldBeUnique with 60s window.

entries.name: theme:preset-thumbnail-backfill
entries.purpose: Nightly 04 UTC — find ThemePreset rows with preview_thumbnail_url IS NULL AND is_active=true; dispatch PreviewPresetJob for each. Catches presets that landed while the render worker was down.

entries.name: theme:contrast-audit-active-themes
entries.purpose: Weekly Monday 05 UTC — run ContrastAuditor across every tenant's active themes; surface findings as ThemeAccessibilityRecommendationNotification. Provides ongoing accessibility signal even without theme edits.
